_comment: Phase-0 topic watchlist for finn's Topic-Trend radar (Feature 5). Aligned to the EXISTING 'Themes' multi-select vocabulary on the '📅 AI Events — Singapore' Notion DB so trend counts map 1:1 to how events are already tagged. 'theme' = the exact Theme string to count (null = an emerging Victor-priority topic with no Theme tag yet, tracked via web_search only). 'aliases' drive title/agenda matching. Loaded into the new 'finn · Topics' DB by radar/notion-bootstrap.mjs; Victor curates (Mute/add) in Notion.

topics.aliases: sovereign AI, national AI, AI sovereignty, government AI, sovereign cloud, sovereign LLM, national compute, digital sovereignty
topics.why_it_matters: Core NVIDIA APAC thesis and Victor's lead proof (Bedrock-SSG, NovA!). >$30B FY26 line. Track whether sovereign framing keeps spreading across APAC/government agendas.

topics.aliases: agentic AI, AI agents, agent frameworks, multi-agent, autonomous agents, agent orchestration, tool use, copilot
topics.why_it_matters: The #1 JD focus area and the developer-frontier lever. Biggest single signal of where developer attention is moving; already on 8 events.

topics.aliases: robotics, physical AI, humanoid, GR00T, Isaac, Jetson, embodied AI, world models, Cosmos, autonomous machines, AMR
topics.why_it_matters: NVIDIA's next platform bet and Victor's hands-on proof (engine inspection, World Models on Cosmos/Isaac/GR00T). Strong APAC manufacturing angle.

topics.aliases: AI infrastructure, data center, GB200, NVL72, Blackwell, DGX, AI factory, accelerated computing, InfiniBand, Spectrum-X, HPC, GPU cluster
topics.why_it_matters: The deployment substrate (YTL Johor GB200, Singtel/Nxera Tuas) and NVIDIA networking. Where the GPU build-out narrative concentrates in SEA.

topics.aliases: enterprise AI, production AI, AI adoption, AI at scale, RAG, copilots, NIM, AI Enterprise, model deployment, private LLM
topics.why_it_matters: The broadest theme (14 events) — the mainstream adoption baseline; NIM/AI-Enterprise sell-through. Useful as the denominator other topics rise against.

topics.aliases: AI safety, AI governance, responsible AI, AI policy, alignment, red-teaming, AI regulation, risk, trust, Singapore Consensus
topics.why_it_matters: Heavy on the SG/IMDA circuit (10 events) and central to sovereign/government engagement. Policy-maker relationships are explicitly in scope (R1 intel).

topics.aliases: inference, NIM, Triton, TensorRT, inference serving, model serving, throughput, latency, inference optimization, tokenomics
topics.why_it_matters: Ettikan's home turf (throughput/energy-efficiency) and Victor's NVIDIA-stack proof (Triton/DALI/TensorRT, 16x GPU). Emerging cross-cut not yet its own Theme — track via search.

topics.aliases: OpenClaw, NemoClaw, OpenShell, agent sandbox, agent runtime, sandboxed agents, MCP, AgentCore, agent isolation
topics.why_it_matters: The stack finn itself runs on. Victor explicitly wants to track whether agent-sandbox tooling gains conference traction vs AWS AgentCore. Pure search signal (no Theme yet).

topics.aliases: tokenomics, cost per token, cost per task, inference cost, AI ROI, unit economics, token economics
topics.why_it_matters: The value-framing lever in the ecosystem deck; the metric a champion re-sells upward. Watch whether cost-per-completed-task framing enters mainstream agendas.

topics.aliases: smart city, video analytics, computer vision, Metropolis, CCTV, crowd analytics, edge AI, traffic, surveillance
topics.why_it_matters: Maps to NVIDIA Metropolis + Victor's CV proof (Hangar, engine inspection). Strong SG government/public-sector fit.

topics.aliases: fintech, financial services AI, fraud detection, risk modelling, RAPIDS, tokenisation, digital assets, CBDC, quant
topics.why_it_matters: SFF anchors the SG calendar (65k attendees); RAPIDS/quant GPU story. Re-check around SFF each November.

topics.aliases: healthcare AI, medical imaging, genomics, Clara, BioNeMo, drug discovery, digital health, MedTech, diagnostics
topics.why_it_matters: NVIDIA Clara/BioNeMo; HealthTechX Asia + MOH angle. Watch for a step-change as health AI matures on the SG circuit.

topics.aliases: quantum, quantum computing, CUDA-Q, hybrid quantum, Q-Day, post-quantum
topics.why_it_matters: Adjacent (CUDA-Q) and rising on SG agendas (6 events, SFF Q-Day). Lower direct BD but a credible 'what's next' signal to watch.

topics.aliases: deep tech, startups, SLINGSHOT, frontier startups, venture, Inception
topics.why_it_matters: SWITCH/SLINGSHOT ecosystem; NVIDIA Inception pipeline. Barometer of the early-stage builder community finn should cultivate.

topics.aliases: research, academia, university, AAAI, NeurIPS, papers, NVAITC, compute grants
topics.why_it_matters: Talent/partnership signal (NVAITC, compute grants) but lower BD velocity — Muted by default; un-mute if cultivating research relationships.

topics.aliases: education, edtech, DLI, Deep Learning Institute, curriculum, teaching
topics.why_it_matters: Edtech/DLI angle but peripheral to the core sovereign/agentic/physical-AI thesis — Muted by default.

topics.aliases: public safety, defence, HTX, homeland security, autonomous systems, border security, MTX, Milipol
topics.why_it_matters: HTX (~50-60 AI staff) + MTX are explicit R1 stakeholders; defence/public-safety AI is a real SG BD lane. Low count now but high strategic weight.

topics.aliases: AI for science, scientific discovery, materials, climate, simulation, AI4Science
topics.why_it_matters: Emerging research cut; Muted by default until it shows up more on the BD-relevant circuit.
